column500:
P/S
                                
                                    Power per Second (DPS)
                                    How effective a move is at dealing damage
column501:
E/S
                                
                                    Energy per Second (EPS)
                                    How effective a fast move is at building up charged move energy
column502:
P/E
                                
                                    Power per Energy (DPE)
                                    How efficiently a charged move converts energy into damage
column503:
P2/ES
                                
                                    P/S * P/E
                                    How well a charged move both uses charged energy and deals damage
column504:
PE/S2
                                
                                    P/S * E/S
                                    How well a fast move accomplishes both building charged energy and dealing damage on its own
